pages.https://docs.rcac.purdue.edu/userguides/:
Anvil User Guide

Official documentation for the Anvil supercomputer.

User Guide

Job SubmissionSystem ArchitectureFrequently Asked QuestionsKey PoliciesBell Running Jobs

Job Submission on Anvil

Anvil uses the Slurm Workload Manager.

Job Submission Script

Submit a job with sbatch. Account (-A or --account) is your allocation account. Partition (-p or --partition) selects a queue. Request wall time with --time and memory with --mem.

Anvil System Architecture

Compute Nodes

Anvil compute nodes use a high-speed InfiniBand fabric with a two-stage fat-tree design.

Anvil Frequently Asked Questions

Contact Anvil support when documentation does not answer a question.

Anvil Policies

Software installation requests are reviewed by the Anvil team.
